ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for the stock data */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock */,
  "prev_close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock from the previous day */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* The change in price from the previous day's close */,
  "change_rate" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous day's close */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* The turnover rate of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of shares traded */,
  "amount" REAL /* The total amount traded */,
  "market_value" REAL /* The market capitalization of the stock */,
  "liquid_market_value" REAL /* The liquid market value of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector or industry category of the stock */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* The current market trend of the stock */,
  "sensitivity_indicator" TEXT /* The sensitivity indicator for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_market_trend FOREIGN KEY ("market_trend") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_sensitivity_indicator FOREIGN KEY ("sensitivity_indicator") REFERENCES sensitivity_indicators ("indicator_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry in which the company operates */,
  "CEO" TEXT /* The CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The headquarters location of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The date the company was founded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry_group" TEXT /* The industry group of the company */,
  "market_cap_category" TEXT /* The market capitalization category of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_group FOREIGN KEY ("industry_group") REFERENCES industry_groups ("industry_group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* The date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* The revenue of the company */,
  "profit" REAL /* The profit of the company */,
  "debt" REAL /* The debt of the company */,
  "assets" REAL /* The assets of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* The revenue growth rate of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* The net income of the company */,
  "EPS" REAL /* The earnings per share (EPS) of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code", "report_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the news item */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* The date the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* The headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news article */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* The relevance of the news article to the company or stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES companies ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the rating */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* The name of the analyst */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was given */,
  "rating" TEXT /* The rating given by the analyst */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* The recommendation given by the analyst */,
  "rating_change" TEXT /* The change in rating from the previous rating */,
  "target_price" REAL /* The target price set by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES companies ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* The type of account the user has (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* The preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert the user wants to receive */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of notifications the user wants to receive */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* The layout of the user's dashboard */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* The threshold for sending alerts to the user */,
  "notification_medium" TEXT /* The medium for sending notifications to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the watchlist item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the user */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* The name of the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES companies ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the portfolio item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the user */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the stock owned by the user */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* The price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* The name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES companies ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the trading activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the user */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* The type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the stock traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* The date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* The price at which the stock was traded */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* The fee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_tax" REAL /* The tax associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES companies ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* The name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_groups" (
  "industry_group_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the industry group */,
  "industry_group_name" TEXT /* The name of the industry group */,
  "industry_group_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the industry group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* The name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensitivity_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the sensitivity indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* The name of the sensitivity indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sensitivity indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the exchange rate */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency for which the exchange rate applies */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* The current exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)
